description: PV unit installed-capacity capital cost.

description: Battery energy-capacity capital cost.
中文说明: 电池储能单位能量容量投资成本。

description: Battery power-conversion capital cost.
中文说明: 电池功率转换单位投资成本。

description: System average annual outage duration.
Value of lost load per unit unserved electricity equivalent.
中文说明: 单位未供电电量对应的停电损失价值。

description: City or region name used in reporting.
Building or building-cluster name used in reporting.

description: PV capacity step used in local refinement.
中文说明: 光伏容量细化搜索步长。

description: Effective rooftop area available for PV installation.
中文说明: 可安装光伏的有效屋顶面积。

description: PV module rated power density per unit installed area.
中文说明: 单位面积光伏组件装机功率。

description: Annual PV O&M cost as a fraction of PV CAPEX.
中文说明: 光伏年度运维成本占 CAPEX 比例。

description: PV project life used for straight-line annualization.
Cooling coefficient of performance for converting cooling thermal load to electricity.
Heating coefficient of performance for converting heating thermal load to electricity.
System average annual interruption frequency.
Annual battery O&M cost as a fraction of battery CAPEX.
中文说明: 电池年度运维成本占 CAPEX 比例。

description: Maximum battery charge/discharge power divided by energy capacity.
Battery round-trip efficiency.
Minimum allowed battery state of charge.
Maximum allowed battery state of charge.
Initial battery state of charge at the beginning of the simulation.
Battery state of health at end of life.
Rated cycle life to end-of-life SOH.
中文说明: 到寿命终止的额定循环次数。

description: Annual battery calendar degradation rate.
Maximum replacement interval if degradation is very low.
Search window around the coarse optimum for local refinement.
中文说明: 在粗筛最优容量附近继续细化的窗口。

description: Battery energy step used in local refinement.
Random seed for outage event generation.
Outage event generation mode.

description: Number of random outage scenarios per parameter value for uncertainty sensitivity analysis.
中文说明: 不确定性敏感性分析中每个参数值的随机停电场景数量。

description: First random seed used for uncertainty outage scenarios.
中文说明: 不确定性停电场景使用的起始随机种子编号。

description: Number of parallel worker processes for uncertainty analysis; 1 means serial execution.
中文说明: 不确定性分析使用的并行进程数；1 表示串行运行。

description: Whether PV generation is available during outage hours.
中文说明: 停电期间 PV 是否可用。
